title: Ched's Realism CTM
description: A CTM resource pack required to make Ched's Realism Mod Properly Work
body:
**This is the CTM resource pack required to make Ched's Realism Mod work.**
##

**This in itself is not a resource pack full of the models you see in the picture, but this is the backbone to make them actually look good.**

We include a few textures that work well with Ched's Realism Mod, and a couple of CTM settings to connect the textures properly on some of our models, such as yellow road paint to make it come together properly

**We Recommend using another texture pack of your choosing to go along with this since it is not an actual full resource pack on its own.**

We plan on releasing a full resource pack in the future to complement Ched's Realism Mod but for now, just a light pack to make things work :) Happy Building!

Check out the mod here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cheds-realism-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cheds-realism-mod)
